description: Style Notebasics adds a sense of sophistication and style to your outfit with this belt. With a rustic and contemporary look, tune up your style quotient with this belt - wear with denim shorts, jeans, or even light coloured formal pants.Product DetailsBrown coloured belt with stitching detail in the centre running throughout the length of the belt, has a loop and a bronze buckle and five buckle holesMaterial and CareSynthetic leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
